title: eugenioides coccineum
intro: Eugenioides coccineum, also known as the red Eugenia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Myrtaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues and inflammation, due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds. The health benefits of Eugenioides coccineum include soothing digestive problems, reducing fever, and acting as an antiseptic. Herbal preparations of Eugenioides coccineum can be found in the form of teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to harness its medicinal properties.
